Decoder side-channels via pendingReplayFromShare flag that init() consumes to trigger playReplay() after a 1.5s delay so the visitor sees the baseline first. Round-trip test: 8-action replay = 178 char base64 URL, decodes to same actions + baseline. +160 LOC (11,497вҶ’11,656, 412 KB), 0 bugs, JS clean, v2 backward compat verified live on deploy.

Prior: Cycle 2 Harden Week, Day 4 (Day 52, May 11): рҹҗӣ FIX EVERYTHING вҖ” entered the day with 0 open bugs, hunted four specific areas Day 51 had flagged, found **2 latent P1 crashes** in gridFocus + Big-Grid edge cases, fixed both same-day with **zero LOC delta**. (1) BUG-017: `handleGridKeyAction()` line 9338 only checked the *lower* bound on gridFocusRow/Col (`< 0`), never the upper. After Big-Grid 16x10 вҶ’ 12x8 toggle (or share-link decode of a small-grid hash while on big grid, or loadPuzzle's auto-shrink), `gridFocusRow=9 / gridFocusCol=15` are stale and out-of-bounds for the new 8x12 grid. Next `Enter` reads `state.grid[9][15]` вҶ’ `state.grid[9]` is undefined вҶ’ `TypeError: Cannot read properties of undefined (reading '15')`. Three call paths verified to reproduce: Settings toggle, decodeGridState (v2 hash with smaller dims), loadPuzzle auto-shrink. (2) BUG-018: same shape via the mouse path вҖ” `handleRemoveCell(row, col)` line 5401 only guards `state.playing`, no bounds check. Delete/Backspace passes `hoveredCell.row/col`, and hoveredCell persists in module-level state across `initGrid()` rebuilds (only mouseover/mouseleave re-set it, neither fires automatically on grid recreation). If the user hovered (9,15) on Big Grid then toggled to Small Grid then pressed Delete *before any mouse move*, same TypeError. **Fix for both:** extend the existing one-line early-return guard with upper-bound clamps. Zero LOC delta because we just made the existing `if-condition` longer (no new lines, no new functions). Before/After: `if (gridFocusRow < 0 || gridFocusCol < 0) return;` вҶ’ `if (gridFocusRow < 0 || gridFocusCol < 0 || gridFocusRow >= ROWS || gridFocusCol >= COLS) return;` and `if (state.playing) return;` вҶ’ `if (state.playing || row < 0 || col < 0 || row >= ROWS || col >= COLS) return;`. Net file size: **11,192 вҶ’ 11,192 lines** (exactly equal вҖ” Harden zero-growth mandate satisfied to the line). JS parses cleanly via `new Function(js)` on 297,740 bytes.
